articles.author: Julie Bort
articles.title: Cerebras IPO makes billions for Benchmark but VC Eric Vishria almost didn't take the meeting - TechCrunch
articles.description: Benchmark almost never backs hardware startups. So Eric Vishria dragged his feet ten years ago before agreeing to hear Cerebras' pitch.
articles.content:
The Cerebras Systems IPO was a smash hit on Thursday, generating billions for itself, its founders, and its major investors. 
Among the big winners is major shareholder Benchmark, which owns 9.5% of… [+6136 chars]
